claims.headline: Upregulates GABA-B receptors
claims.notesSentence: Repeated administration of fasoracetam (NS-105) reversed learned helplessness in rats with effects implicating GABA-B receptor up-regulation.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Fasoracetam NS-105 GABA-B up-regulation study on PubMed

claims.headline: Studied in mGluR-network ADHD
claims.notesSentence: An open-label trial in adolescents with ADHD and mGluR-network gene variants reported reduced ADHD severity scores.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Fasoracetam adolescent mGluR ADHD trial on PubMed
